settings.heading: Find the right help without the runaround
settings.copy: Start with the task in front of you, then move into downloads, manuals, compatibility, or direct help from one clear hub.

settings.heading: Start with the task you need to complete
settings.copy: Choose the path that best matches what you need right now, from setup files and manuals to compatibility checks or direct support.

settings.title: Downloads
settings.copy: Drivers, firmware, and utilities for the product you already have.

settings.title: Manuals
settings.copy: Quick-start guides, user manuals, and setup notes by product family.

settings.title: Compatibility
settings.copy: Check fit before you buy or confirm the right workflow after purchase.

settings.title: Warranty and contact
settings.copy: Move into warranty or direct help when self-service is no longer enough.

settings.heading: Keep the next useful path close
settings.copy: Move into troubleshooting, FAQ, or warranty help without losing the support context or starting over.

settings.title: Troubleshooting
settings.copy: Use symptom-led help when a product is connected but not behaving as expected.

settings.title: FAQ
settings.copy: Answer the broad questions first before moving into a deeper support path.

settings.title: Warranty
settings.copy: Review coverage, claim expectations, and when support should be contacted first.

settings.heading: Need help beyond self-service resources?
settings.copy: If self-service is not enough, move directly into contact or warranty guidance from here with the right context already in place.
